current_public_release.immutable_policy: The v0.1.0 document-level data snapshot is immutable except for metadata, documentation, cross-reference, and provenance corrections that do not alter public rows, columns, source hashes, or intended use.

release_levels.description: Canonical normalized document records from the supplied DocumentsDB extract, plus release metadata, provenance, and public-surface evidence.
validation_gates: source inventory hash and member count match
historical coverage audit does not claim full historical completeness
publication_gates: GitHub release, Hugging Face dataset, and Zenodo DOI are synchronized
source ZIP is not redistributed unless a later rights review approves it
metadata-only corrections do not mutate public dataset rows

release_levels.description: Official-first source inventories and retrieval evidence used to support derived member, party, sitting, bill, motion, vote, and procedure assertions.
validation_gates: authority source manifest validates against schema
official New Zealand Parliament sources are preferred where available
retrieval date, source hash, reuse note, and coverage gaps are recorded
publication_gates: authority source artifacts are published as manifests or evidence, not as resolved derived fields
current-only authority sources are not reused as historical proof without dated snapshots

release_levels.description: Validated repository-owned component tables such as sittings, proceedings, speech turns, members, parties, motions, votes, bills, topics, and annotations.
validation_gates: component schema includes required release-series fields
component rows cite document-level source records and authority sources where applicable
gold or focused validation proves the component is not merely candidate output
publication_gates: candidate components remain excluded from public endpoint exports
component release versions are independent from v0.1.0 document-level data

release_levels.description: Generated standard-specific endpoint artifacts such as ParlaMint/TEI, Popolo/Open Civic Data, Akoma Ntoso, CAP/ParlaCAP, CoNLL-U, RDF, Croissant, RO-Crate, Frictionless, DCAT, and PROV-O.
validation_gates: endpoint contract declares schema or ontology version
endpoint artifacts validate with the relevant external validator
endpoint manifest cites input component releases and known exclusions
publication_gates: endpoint releases are not bundled into document-level releases
endpoint publication target and upstream contribution target are explicit

release_levels.description: Reviewed samples, fixtures, mapping notes, issue-ready evidence, or contribution packages for external maintainers and standards communities.
validation_gates: sample package is reproducible from validated endpoint or component artifacts
mapping notes document NZ-specific assumptions and exclusions
maintainer-facing package includes checksums and source manifest references
publication_gates: upstream contribution is separate from local endpoint publication
external acceptance or feedback does not retroactively change canonical release status

artifact_map.next_gate: metadata-only corrections allowed; material data changes require a new dataset release and Zenodo snapshot
row, column, provenance, or intended-use changes require a new release
schema-breaking changes require release notes, migration notes, and manifest updates
broader historical claims require official sitting and proceeding reconciliation
retrieve dated official snapshots before publishing derived authoritative fields
add component schemas and validation manifests before public component release
future derived component and endpoint releases must cite relevant fixture IDs or a refreshed evaluation manifest
RDF, civic-data, and endpoint releases must validate generated IDs and URIs against this policy
endpoint releases must cite required optional groups, install checks, tool/library/model versions, and pin release-affecting dependencies
procedure-derived components must cite authority sources, uncertainty status, fixture coverage, and endpoint mappings before publication
component releases must validate schemas, stable IDs, provenance, derivation metadata, validation manifests, and referential integrity before publication
promote only after validation proves speaker attribution and turn boundaries
endpoint manifests must cite input component release versions and validators
sample-not-release; promote only after member identity, party attribution, speech-turn validation, and full ParlaMint schema validation pass

artifact_map.artifact: Popolo / Open Civic Data sample package
artifact_map.next_gate: sample-not-release; promote only after member identity, party attribution, vote/motion extraction, speech-turn validation, and maintainer agreement
sample-not-release; promote only after validated member, party, speech-turn, motion, and vote components plus schema/profile selection
publish only through release upload workflows with checksums and DOI/revision references
build sample packages after endpoint validators pass

surface_relationships.relationship: Home for source code, release manifests, schemas, docs, checks, issues, and lightweight release assets.
Canonical live host for document-level Parquet and, only after later validation, endpoint-specific dataset layouts.
Immutable DOI-bearing archive for stable public release snapshots.
Optional future mirror or review-bundle host; inactive for current public claims.
External standards or maintainer communities receive contribution packages after local endpoint validation, not as canonical dataset releases.
